description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cruiser design with a low-slung frame, elongated front fork, and wide, swept-back handlebars. The body is finished in a deep red color with orange flame detailing on the fuel tank, giving it a bold and stylish appearance. The seat is contoured for comfort, with a raised rear section for a passenger. The wheels are large and spoked, with a prominent front headlight and chrome exhaust pipe extending along the right side. The engine is exposed, showcasing metallic components and a V-twin configuration. The overall build suggests a robust, road-ready vehicle suitable for urban and highway travel.
description: A red and orange flame-detailed cruiser motorcycle with wide handlebars, spoked wheels, and a chrome exhaust. It has a low, comfortable seat and exposed engine parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, central headlight, and front wheel alignment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flame-detailed fuel tank, spoked wheels, and contoured seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wheel, seat profile, and the end of the exhaust pipe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chrome exhaust, engine details, and the full length of the motorcycle.
